response.justification: Bogdan is a highly capable Staff/Senior Software Engineer with extensive backend and distributed systems experience, but he lacks the executive leadership background required for a CTO role. There is no evidence on his resume of scaling engineering organizations, managing managers, structuring governance frameworks, or strategically directing complex AI-native fintech architectures at an executive level.
strengths: Deep individual contributor (IC) experience in backend and distributed systems, handling high-throughput microservices (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby).
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, Model Context Protocol (MCP), and agentic workflows at Google.
Some domain exposure to fintech and pricing strategies through roles at RIDE Capital and Meta.
concerns: Zero evidence of executive-level engineering leadership, developing senior technical layers, or scaling a team from 10 to 30+ people.
Lacks demonstrated experience architecting stateful multi-agent AI systems for real-time financial decisioning and credit risk.
Career history is heavily focused on individual contribution, open-source development, and software craftsmanship rather than organizational governance or strategic roadmap ownership.
